unitTests

Class StackTest

  • java.lang.Object
    • unitTests.StackTest

  • public class StackTest
extends java.lang.Object
    Version:
    3.2 Aug. 28, 2024 Class Description: Test for the Arraylist-based implementation of the StackADT defined in the CPRG 304 Assignment 2.
    Author:
    kitty, maryam

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      StackTest() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setUp()
      Initializes a MyStack instance and five Integer instances before each test.
      void tearDown()
      Cleans up instances used after each test.
      void testClear_Size()
      Test method for MyStack.clear() to clear the items of the stack.
      void testConstructor()
      Test method for MyStack.MyStack() to create a stack.
      void testContains_False()
      Test method for MyStack.contains(java.lang.Object) to return false when the stack doesn't contain the item.
      void testContains_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyStack.contains(java.lang.Object) to throw a NullPointerException when null is passed.
      void testContains_True()
      Test method for MyStack.contains(java.lang.Object) to return true when the stack contains an item.
      void testEquals_False()
      Test method for implementations.MyStack#equals(utilities.MyStack) to return false when the two stacks are not equal.
      void testEquals_True()
      Test method for implementations.MyStack#equals(utilities.MyStack) to return true when the two stacks are equal.
      void testIsEmpty_False()
      Test method for MyStack.isEmpty() to return false when the stack is not empty.
      void testIsEmpty_True()
      Test method for MyStack.isEmpty() to return true when the stack is empty.
      void testIterator_Empty()
      Test method for MyStack.iterator() to return an iterator to iterate over items in an empty stack.
      void testIterator_NotEmpty()
      Test method for MyStack.iterator() to return an iterator to iterate over items in the stack from top to bottom.
      void testPeek_Empty()
      Test method for MyStack.peek() to throw EmptyStackException when peeking at the top of an empty stack.
      void testPeek_Top()
      Test method for MyStack.peek() to return the item on the top of the stack without removing it.
      void testPop_Empty()
      Test method for MyStack.pop() to throw EmptyStackException when removing from an empty stack.
      void testPop_Top()
      Test method for MyStack.pop() to remove the item on top of the stack.
      void testPush_NullPointerException()
      Test method for MyStack.push(java.lang.Object) to throw a NullPointerException when adding a null to the stack.
      void testPush_Top()
      Test method for MyStack.push(java.lang.Object) to add multiple items to top of the stack.
      void testSearch_Botton()
      Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return the position of an item at the bottom of the stack.
      void testSearch_Middle()
      Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return the position of an item in the middle of the stack.
      void testSearch_NotFound()
      Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return -1 when the item is not found in the stack.
      void testSearch_Top()
      Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return the position of an item at the top of the stack.
      void testSize_AddMany()
      Test method for utilities.MyStack#size() to return size when there are many items in the stack.
      void testSize_Empty()
      Test method for utilities.MyStack#size() to return size when stack is empty.
      void testSize_One()
      Test method for utilities.MyStack#size() to return size when stack has one item.
      void testStackoverflow()
      Test method for implementations.MyStack#stackOverflow(E[]) to return false since the stack doesn't have a fixed size .
      void testToArray()
      Test method for MyStack.toArray() to return an Object array containing all the items in the stack from top to bottom.
      void testToArrayEArray_Insufficient()
      Test method for implementations.MyStack#toArray(E[]) returning an array containing all items in the stack when the array passed doesn't have sufficient length.
      void testToArrayEArray_Sufficient()
      Test method for implementations.MyStack#toArray(E[]) returning an array containing all items in the stack when the array passed has sufficient length.
      void testToArrayNullArray()
      Test method for implementations.MyStack#toArray(E[]) to throw NullPointerException when a null is passed.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • StackTest

        public StackTest()

           throws java.lang.Exception
        Initializes a MyStack instance and five Integer instances before each test.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

              throws java.lang.Exception
        Cleans up instances used after each test.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception

      • testConstructor

        public void testConstructor()
        Test method for MyStack.MyStack() to create a stack.

      • testClear_Size

        public void testClear_Size()
        Test method for MyStack.clear() to clear the items of the stack.

      • testContains_True

        public void testContains_True()
        Test method for MyStack.contains(java.lang.Object) to return true when the stack contains an item.

      • testContains_False

        public void testContains_False()
        Test method for MyStack.contains(java.lang.Object) to return false when the stack doesn't contain the item.

      • testContains_NullPointerException

        public void testContains_NullPointerException()
        Test method for MyStack.contains(java.lang.Object) to throw a NullPointerException when null is passed.

      • testEquals_True

        public void testEquals_True()
        Test method for implementations.MyStack#equals(utilities.MyStack) to return true when the two stacks are equal.

      • testEquals_False

        public void testEquals_False()
        Test method for implementations.MyStack#equals(utilities.MyStack) to return false when the two stacks are not equal.

      • testIsEmpty_True

        public void testIsEmpty_True()
        Test method for MyStack.isEmpty() to return true when the stack is empty.

      • testIsEmpty_False

        public void testIsEmpty_False()
        Test method for MyStack.isEmpty() to return false when the stack is not empty.

      • testIterator_NotEmpty

        public void testIterator_NotEmpty()
        Test method for MyStack.iterator() to return an iterator to iterate over items in the stack from top to bottom.

      • testIterator_Empty

        public void testIterator_Empty()
        Test method for MyStack.iterator() to return an iterator to iterate over items in an empty stack.

      • testPeek_Top

        public void testPeek_Top()
                  throws java.util.EmptyStackException
        Test method for MyStack.peek() to return the item on the top of the stack without removing it.
        Throws:
        java.util.EmptyStackException

      • testPeek_Empty

        public void testPeek_Empty()
        Test method for MyStack.peek() to throw EmptyStackException when peeking at the top of an empty stack.

      • testPop_Top

        public void testPop_Top()
                 throws java.util.EmptyStackException
        Test method for MyStack.pop() to remove the item on top of the stack.
        Throws:
        java.util.EmptyStackException

      • testPop_Empty

        public void testPop_Empty()
        Test method for MyStack.pop() to throw EmptyStackException when removing from an empty stack.

      • testPush_Top

        public void testPush_Top()
                  throws java.util.EmptyStackException
        Test method for MyStack.push(java.lang.Object) to add multiple items to top of the stack.
        Throws:
        java.util.EmptyStackException

      • testPush_NullPointerException

        public void testPush_NullPointerException()
        Test method for MyStack.push(java.lang.Object) to throw a NullPointerException when adding a null to the stack.

      • testSearch_Botton

        public void testSearch_Botton()
        Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return the position of an item at the bottom of the stack.

      • testSearch_Top

        public void testSearch_Top()
        Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return the position of an item at the top of the stack.

      • testSearch_Middle

        public void testSearch_Middle()
        Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return the position of an item in the middle of the stack.

      • testSearch_NotFound

        public void testSearch_NotFound()
        Test method for MyStack.search(java.lang.Object) to return -1 when the item is not found in the stack.

      • testSize_Empty

        public void testSize_Empty()
        Test method for utilities.MyStack#size() to return size when stack is empty.

      • testSize_One

        public void testSize_One()
        Test method for utilities.MyStack#size() to return size when stack has one item.

      • testSize_AddMany

        public void testSize_AddMany()
        Test method for utilities.MyStack#size() to return size when there are many items in the stack.

      • testToArray

        public void testToArray()
        Test method for MyStack.toArray() to return an Object array containing all the items in the stack from top to bottom.

      • testToArrayEArray_Sufficient

        public void testToArrayEArray_Sufficient()
        Test method for implementations.MyStack#toArray(E[]) returning an array containing all items in the stack when the array passed has sufficient length.

      • testToArrayEArray_Insufficient

        public void testToArrayEArray_Insufficient()
        Test method for implementations.MyStack#toArray(E[]) returning an array containing all items in the stack when the array passed doesn't have sufficient length.

      • testToArrayNullArray

        public void testToArrayNullArray()
        Test method for implementations.MyStack#toArray(E[]) to throw NullPointerException when a null is passed.

      • testStackoverflow

        public void testStackoverflow()
        Test method for implementations.MyStack#stackOverflow(E[]) to return false since the stack doesn't have a fixed size .
